wikitext.*:
====Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon====
Lusamine uses this team both in the one-time battle at Aether Paradise and in the [[Pokémon League (Alola)/Title Defense|Title Defense]] battles at the {{al|Pokémon League}}.

Winning against Lusamine during the main story is not mandatory. The player will not [[black out]] and the story will progress either way.
